capabilities.name: Project-scoped instruction file
capabilities.what: A repo file giving the agent standing instructions and context.

capabilities.name: Packaged reusable extensions
capabilities.what: A way to bundle reusable capabilities/instructions the agent can load.

anthropic.notes: Grounded via skill preloading; Skills + plugins both supported.

capabilities.name: Lifecycle event hooks
capabilities.what: Run custom logic on agent events (e.g. before/after a tool call, on stop).

anthropic.notes: Grounded on the permissions page; agent lifecycle hooks are in preview.

openai.notes: Full hooks framework: SessionStart, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PermissionRequest, Pre/PostCompact, UserPromptSubmit, SubagentStop, Stop.

capabilities.name: Output & system-prompt customization
capabilities.what: Shape the agent's system prompt, persona, or output style.

google.notes: No output-style / system-prompt-customization node grounded for Antigravity (behavior is steered via Rules) — verify.

openai.notes: No output-style node grounded for Codex beyond custom instruction filenames — verify.

capabilities.name: Model selection
capabilities.what: Choose which underlying model the agent runs on.

anthropic.notes: Switch mid-session with /model, or set a default via the model setting in settings.json.

google.notes: Model-selector dropdown (Gemini + Claude + GPT-OSS options); also the /model CLI command.

capabilities.name: External tool/connector protocol (MCP)
capabilities.what: A standard way to connect external tools, data, and services.

capabilities.name: MCP server management & registry
capabilities.what: Install, configure, scope, and discover MCP servers.

anthropic.implementation: Managed MCP config, install scopes, desktop connectors

capabilities.name: MCP authentication
capabilities.what: Authenticate to MCP servers (OAuth, tokens).

google.notes: No MCP-authentication-specific node grounded for Antigravity — verify.

capabilities.name: MCP tool governance / allow-listing
capabilities.what: Control which MCP tools/resources the agent may use.

capabilities.name: Persistent agent memory
capabilities.what: Durable memory the agent keeps across turns/sessions.

google.notes: No persistent agent-memory node grounded for Antigravity — verify.

openai.notes: No persistent agent-memory node grounded for Codex — verify.

capabilities.name: Context compaction (manual + auto)
capabilities.what: Compress conversation/context to extend effective working memory.

anthropic.notes: Manual /compact at task breaks + auto-compaction as the context window fills.

google.notes: No official Antigravity doc describes context compaction/auto-summarization (checked the CLI slash-command reference, SDK lifecycle hooks, and IDE/CLI hook events) — genuine gap.

openai.notes: Manual /compact; automatic compaction via the model_auto_compact_token_limit config key.

capabilities.name: Prompt / context caching
capabilities.what: Cache repeated context to cut latency and cost.

anthropic.notes: Claude Code manages server-side prefix caching automatically; no user config required.

google.notes: A Gemini model-API feature Antigravity inherits; no Antigravity-specific caching doc page.

openai.notes: An OpenAI API platform feature (automatic prefix caching) that Codex inherits; not Codex-specific config.

capabilities.name: Subagents / delegated agents
capabilities.what: Spawn focused sub-agents to handle parts of a task.

capabilities.name: Multi-agent teams & messaging
capabilities.what: Coordinate multiple agents that share work and communicate.

anthropic.notes: Agent Teams in preview; dispatch/monitor active.

google.notes: Multi-agent teamwork in preview; inter-agent messaging active.

capabilities.name: Workflows / saved automations
capabilities.what: Define repeatable, named multi-step task sequences.

openai.notes: Workflow orchestration via the Agents SDK.

capabilities.name: Plan-then-execute mode
capabilities.what: Produce a reviewable plan before the agent edits anything.

google.notes: No distinct plan-then-execute mode grounded for Antigravity — verify.

openai.notes: No distinct plan-mode node grounded for Codex (read-only sandbox mode exists, but that's not a plan gate) — verify.

capabilities.name: Goal-directed autonomous iteration
capabilities.what: Set a verifiable "done" condition; the agent loops on its own until met.

anthropic.notes: Auto Mode + Routines in preview; /goal + /loop run in the CLI (this matrix was built with /goal).

google.notes: An autonomy control, not a verifiable-goal loop — partial fit.

openai.notes: An autonomy/approval mode, not a named goal-condition loop — partial fit.

capabilities.name: Parallel isolated workspaces
capabilities.what: Work on multiple branches/copies in parallel without collisions.

capabilities.name: Cloud execution environment
capabilities.what: Run the agent in a managed cloud/container environment.

anthropic.implementation: Cloud sessions (Claude Code on the Web) + SDK containers
anthropic.notes: Web cloud sessions in preview; Agent SDK container deployment is active.

google.notes: No managed cloud-execution environment grounded for Antigravity (a desktop/CLI tool) — verify.

openai.implementation: Cloud environments (+ base image, container caching)

capabilities.name: Background / async execution
capabilities.what: Run tasks in the background or asynchronously without blocking.

openai.notes: Codex delegates long tasks to async cloud runs.

capabilities.name: Scheduled / triggered runs
capabilities.what: Run the agent on a schedule or trigger without supervision.

capabilities.name: Sandboxed execution
capabilities.what: Run agent actions in an isolated environment to limit blast radius.

capabilities.name: Tool permission controls
capabilities.what: Approve/deny what the agent is allowed to do.

capabilities.name: Network / egress control
capabilities.what: Restrict the agent's outbound network access.

openai.notes: Network rules / sandbox proxy in beta.

capabilities.name: Prompt-injection protection
capabilities.what: Defenses against malicious instructions in tool/web content.

google.notes: No prompt-injection-specific defense node grounded for Antigravity — verify.

openai.notes: No prompt-injection-specific defense node grounded for Codex (code security scanning exists, which is distinct) — verify.

capabilities.name: Security scanning / threat model
capabilities.what: Scan code/agent actions for security issues against a threat model.

anthropic.implementation: Security guidance plugin + custom scan rules

google.notes: No security-scanning node grounded for Antigravity — verify.

capabilities.name: Dev-container integration
capabilities.what: Run the agent inside a defined dev container / isolated runtime.

google.notes: Sidecars are Antigravity's per-agent container-runtime equivalent.

openai.notes: Codex uses managed cloud container envs (see cloud-execution-environment); no local dev-container integration grounded — verify.

capabilities.name: Audit logging / telemetry
capabilities.what: A record of agent actions for review/compliance.

google.notes: SDK-level observability; dedicated admin audit-log specifics unverified.

capabilities.name: Automated code review
capabilities.what: The agent reviews diffs / PRs for issues before they land.

google.notes: Reviews agent-produced artifacts before they land.

capabilities.name: Cost & usage tracking
capabilities.what: Track and cap token spend / usage.

google.notes: No cost/usage-tracking node grounded for Antigravity — verify.

openai.notes: No Codex-specific cost/usage-tracking node grounded (platform usage exists separately) — verify.

capabilities.name: Evals / testing harness
capabilities.what: Run evaluations / test suites against the agent's behavior.

anthropic.notes: No agentic-coding eval-harness node grounded for Claude Code (code-review verification exists, which is distinct) — verify.

google.notes: No evals/testing-harness node grounded for Antigravity — verify.

openai.notes: OpenAI's evals harness, used with Codex/Agents SDK.

capabilities.name: Checkpoint / rewind
capabilities.what: Save points you can roll back to, and undo agent changes.

anthropic.notes: Auto-tracks file edits; /rewind or Esc-Esc restores conversation and/or code; checkpoints persist across sessions.

google.notes: Rolls back the conversation thread to a previous message (CLI).

openai.notes: Opt-in (documented 'stable; off by default'); narrower than a full checkpoint/rewind UI. Not Codex Sites version-saving.

capabilities.name: Resume / fork session
capabilities.what: Continue or branch a previous session.

google.notes: /resume loads a previous thread; /fork clones history into a new session; can also import desktop conversations.

capabilities.name: Remote control (mobile / web)
capabilities.what: Steer or approve agent runs from a phone or remote client.

anthropic.notes: Steer/approve runs from the Claude mobile app; in preview.

google.notes: No remote-control / mobile node grounded for Antigravity (a desktop/CLI tool) — verify.

capabilities.name: Notifications
capabilities.what: Push notifications on run progress / completion.

google.notes: No notifications node grounded for Antigravity — verify.

capabilities.name: Chat-surface integration
capabilities.what: Drive the agent from chat/issue tools (Slack, Linear, channels).

google.notes: No chat-surface (Slack/Linear/channels) integration grounded for Antigravity — verify.

capabilities.name: Access surfaces
capabilities.what: Where the agent can be used: terminal, IDE, web, cloud, mobile.

anthropic.notes: Web surface + web↔terminal handoff in preview; terminal/IDE/Slack active.
